productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Monte Road Black Shoe
description: Up your everyday style quotient with the rockport Monte Road oxfords. This athletic inspired everyday oxford shoe is as comfortable as it is stylish with it's multiple overlays and round bicycle toe, coupled with Adiprene comfort.Upper Full grain leather upper for a classic look and durability Multiple leather overlays for added support Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Rounded, bicycle toe silhouette for comfortable use Padded collar and tongue for snug, all-day comfort Breathable air-mesh lining for dry and fresh all-day comfort to the feet Midsole Low profile rubber midsole for lightweight comfort Leather sockliner for moisture management Perforated footbed with adiPRENE deep cushioning insole that offers a light, responsive ride, coupled with adiPRENE+ footbed pads for maximum shock absorption and forefoot cushioning for a resilient ride Outsole Durable rubber outsole in a low profile format and pebble pattern along the entire length of the outsole for maximum traction and grip on various surfaces Decoupled forefoot with flex grooves on the medial side for easy movement of the foot Shock distributing grooves on the heel with larger lugs on a back heel unit for better impact protection at the heel Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
